name: osdu-activity-workflow
description: Test osdu-activity skill — pipeline monitoring and MR tracking across OSDU services

steps.name: pipeline-status
steps.prompt: what OSDU pipelines are failing right now?

assertions.description: Does NOT run osdu-quality commands (mentioning it is fine)

steps.name: open-mrs
steps.prompt: ok now show me what MRs are open for the storage service

assertions.description: Uses osdu-activity for cross-service MR lookup

steps.name: boundary-test
steps.prompt: are the storage tests flaky? I've seen them fail intermittently

assertions.description: Routes to osdu-quality for test reliability (not activity)
